**Adventure Time S06E04 - The Tower**

⌛ July 19, 2026 at 23:59:00 EDT

seriesid=`757073` titleid=`2014406` mediaid=`5021f876e7d72e69992bec997c0065d4dc42d6bf`  
_Finn doesn't like any of the new arms the princesses give him so he builds a tower into space to find his dad and get his old arm back._
